note: Non-secret provisioning identity for Railway project 'vygo', recorded from the approved Vault Provisioner run (provider railway, create_project true; existing project + Postgres/Redis/api/worker were reused, all ok). Contains ONLY public identifiers copied from Railway — no token, vault consumer key, connection string, or any secret value. This is the armed-provisioning attestation the build consumes (scripts/provision-railway.ts, then scripts/generate-foundation-status.ts) when build-time PROVISION_*/FOUNDATION_* env is not injected into the Vercel build. Build-time env, when present, still takes precedence over this file.
